scripts.build:android:preview: bun x eas-cli build --platform android --profile preview --non-interactive
scripts.build:android:apk: bun x eas-cli build --platform android --profile production-apk --non-interactive
scripts.build:android:production: bun x eas-cli build --platform android --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.build:ios:production: bun x eas-cli build --platform ios --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.submit:android:production: bun x eas-cli submit --platform android --profile production --non-interactive
